title: Lasagne Dish, 2PCS 9x5 inch Rectangular Ceramics Baking Dishes with Handle, Coloured Small Oven to Table Baking Dish Ideal for Oven Ceramic Baking Pan Lasagna Casserole Pan Individual Bakeware(Green)
features: 🔴【Stylish Rectangular Baking Pans Set】The rectangular baking pans set is equipped with a double handle design for easy food transport from the oven to the table. It is also a charming decoration in your kitchen and dining table which may impress your guests!

🔴【High-Quality Ceramic】This bakeware is made of high-quality ceramic. The surface of the baking pan is smooth and shiny and very easy to clean. Oven, microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe. Size: 22 x 12 x 5 cm (650ML).
🔴【Stackable And Easy To Clean】Baking dish sets can be stacked to save cabinet space. Smooth glaze, easy to clean, you can wash it with soap or hot water, and dishwasher safe.

🔴【Various Color Designs】This collection of little baking dishes is available in three distinct solid colors: red, blue, and green. These oven-safe plates will give lasagna dishes, holiday dinner tables, or elegant family meals a brilliant flash of color.

🔴【Meet Your Daily Needs】Rectangular baking dish set serve for pizza, bread, pasta, lasagna, chicken, roast, beef, vegetables, casserole, tapas and storage, meet your different needs. These small dishes are perfect for use in the kitchen or when taking food to friends and family.
description: Product Description These pans are made of food grade ceramic. The non-stick and smooth glaze prevents sticking or peeling and is easy to clean in the dishwasher or hand wash with soap and water. Suitable for Any Occasion These YFWOOD baking tray sets come in a exquisite package. Perfect for housewarming, banquets, Thanksgiving, mother's day, father's day, parties, Christmas and New Year gifts for your friends and family. Double handle design Dual handles for a comfortable grip and safe access to ovens and microwaves. High-fired ceramic, scratch-free glaze for durability and even heat distribution, so food bakes evenly while retaining heat and not absorbing moisture. Easy to Store YFWOOD bowls stack nicely and occupy a small space in the kitchen cupboard. They wash perfectly in the dishwasher or easily by hand.
